name: Hollywood Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Hollywood Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop located in Los Angeles offering collateral-based lending and jewelry services. Contact them at (323) 660-0964 for pawn transactions.
description_long:
Hollywood Jewelry & Loan operates as a pawn shop in the Los Feliz neighborhood of Los Angeles at 1547 N Vermont Ave. The business is listed on Resaling, America's Resale Directory, which connects consumers with local brick-and-mortar resale and specialty retail outlets. The company functions within the secondary market for jewelry and personal items.

Based on the available website information, Hollywood Jewelry & Loan offers pawn services, which typically involve providing short-term loans secured by personal collateral such as jewelry, electronics, and other valuables. Customers can call the shop directly at (323) 660-0964 to inquire about specific pawn transactions, loan terms, and available services. The business emphasizes direct customer contact for service details.

The shop distinguishes itself by its established location in a high-traffic Los Angeles neighborhood and its focus on jewelry-related transactions, as suggested by the company name. Being listed on Resaling provides local visibility and positions the business within the organized resale and specialty retail ecosystem. The directory listing allows customers to access directions, contact information, and the ability to leave ratings and notes about their experience.

A significant limitation is the minimal information provided on their Resaling directory listing. The website does not detail specific loan terms, interest rates, fees, loan amounts, repayment periods, or acceptance criteria. There is no information about business hours, whether jewelry is bought outright or only loaned against, or what other items beyond jewelry may be accepted. Prospective customers must call directly to learn about specific offerings and terms, making comparison shopping difficult.
address: 1547 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90027

company_info.headquarters: 1547 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90027

pros: Located in accessible Los Feliz neighborhood at 1547 N Vermont Ave, Los Angeles
Direct phone contact available at (323) 660-0964 for immediate inquiries
Established pawn shop with jewelry specialization implied by company name
Listed on organized Resaling directory for local visibility and customer reviews
Allows customers to pin, rate, and take notes on the business through Resaling platform
Physical brick-and-mortar location for in-person transactions and inspections
cons: Minimal service details available online—customers must call for loan terms, rates, and fees
No posted interest rates, APR, loan amounts, or repayment period information on listing
Unclear whether business buys jewelry outright or only offers collateral loans
No business hours listed on directory entry, making visit planning difficult
Limited transparency about what items beyond jewelry are accepted as collateral
best_for: Los Angeles residents needing quick cash using jewelry or valuables as collateral
Local customers seeking to sell or pawn jewelry without traveling far
Individuals preferring in-person transactions and direct evaluation of items
diagnosis: Hollywood Jewelry & Loan is best for Los Angeles residents who own jewelry or valuables and need quick short-term cash without credit checks. The main caveat is the almost complete lack of online transparency about loan terms, fees, interest rates, and specific policies—you must call or visit in person to learn what they actually offer and at what cost.
services: Pawn loans secured by jewelry and valuables
Physical shop location for walk-in service
